items.title: Follow live: Norway, England meet in quarterfinal ...

items.title: Norway vs England, FIFA World Cup LIVE: Kane's Lions take on Haaland's upstart Vikings
items.summary: The winner of the quarterfinal will play either Argentina or Switzerland in the semifinal
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Noskova holds her nerve to beat Muchova for first Wimbledon title
items.summary: Linda Noskova overcomes missing out on five Championship points in the second set, to defeat Karolina Muchova 6-2 5-7 6-3 to win her first Wimbledon title at 21 years old.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
